dsl_rule.translation_notes: Channel breakout mapped to Donchian channels (dc_upper/dc_lower for n-period highest high/lowest low). Confirmation bar check implemented via prev_close comparison. Exit when price closes back inside channel (toward dc_middle). Lookback period n=20 is implicit in Donchian indicator calculation. Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT as signal generates both long and short entries based on breakout direction.

backtest_rule.reason: Channel breakout mapped to Donchian channels (dc_upper/dc_lower for n-period highest high/lowest low). Confirmation bar check implemented via prev_close comparison. Exit when price closes back inside channel (toward dc_middle). Lookback period n=20 is implicit in Donchian indicator calculation. Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT as signal generates both long and short entries based on breakout direction.

source_rule_text: A trader should use channel-breakout operators to filter noise and identify the current trend direction in a time series before entering trend-following trades.
